title: Retro-Age epigenetic clock CpGs are enriched 3.744-fold at identity-dependent TEs and the enrichment survives GC- and length-stratified permutation

subject.display: Migration cohort for 'Retro-Age epigenetic clock CpGs are enriched 3.744-fold at identity-dependent TE'
subject.note: Inclusion predicates intentionally empty at migration time; the implicit member set is defined by the v1.1 premises. Re-author with explicit inclusion predicates to tighten the subject.

source.note: Per-TE surveillance mode classification from exp03. MOD-3 loaded 4,965,852 TEs.

Retro-Age epigenetic clock CpG probe set from Ndhlovu et al. 2024 — CpGs selected specifically because their methylation erodes with age at retrotransposons. BED file at internal/InSilico/TE surveillance/data/retro_age_cpgs.bed. 817 TEs overlap a Retro-Age CpG (0.02% of the TE corpus).

operations.note: 2x2: surv_mode == 'identity_dependent' x is_retro_age_overlap. Identity-dependent mode n=196,193; Retro-Age overlap n=817; intersection n=109.

statistics.name: fisher_odds_ratio_raw
statistics.note: Raw OR from MOD-3 log. Identity-dependent TEs are 3.74x enriched for Retro-Age clock CpGs — the largest effect size among the three headline enrichments in paper1.

statistics.name: gc_matched_permutation_or
statistics.note: GC-stratified permutation: 3.720 — negligible attenuation from raw 3.744. The enrichment is orthogonal to GC.

statistics.name: gc_matched_permutation_p
statistics.note: Log reports 0.0000; pinned at 1e-4 upper bound.

statistics.name: cochran_mantel_haenszel_or_gc
statistics.note: CMH OR across GC strata; CMH p = 1.40e-40.

statistics.name: length_matched_permutation_or
statistics.note: Length-stratified OR = raw. Size is also not a confound.

inference.justification: Four conjuncts (stricter OR threshold than CoRSIV because this is the larger-effect sibling): (1) raw OR > 2.0 — Retro-Age enrichment is more than 2x baseline; (2) GC-matched OR > 2.0 — survives GC matching with negligible attenuation (3.720 vs 3.744 raw); (3) GC-matched perm p < 0.001; (4) length-matched OR > 2.0 rules out size confound. The identity-of-OR from raw to GC-stratified to length-stratified is the load-bearing result.
inference.failure_mode: If either the GC-matched or length-matched OR dropped below 2.0, the Retro-Age–identity-dependent specificity would weaken. Attenuation to OR ~1 under matching would mean the clock is measuring GC-rich TEs regardless of surveillance mode.

conclusion.assertion: Among ~5M autosomal TEs, those classified into the 'identity_dependent' surveillance mode are enriched 3.744-fold for overlap with Retro-Age epigenetic clock CpGs (Ndhlovu 2024; raw p = 5.84e-28; n_overlap = 109 of 817 clock CpGs). The enrichment persists essentially unchanged under 10,000-iteration GC-stratified (OR = 3.720) and length-stratified (OR = 3.744) permutation (both empirical p < 1e-4), indicating that epigenetic aging clocks preferentially measure methylation at dual-silenced (KRAB-ZnF + DNA methylation) TEs — the population that carries methylation in the first place.

scope.scale_note: One of the 9 mode-marker combinations in MOD-3. Sibling claim: CoRSIV x identity-dependent.

external_assumptions.statement: Ndhlovu 2024 Retro-Age clock probe set is a faithful catalog of retrotransposon-associated CpGs whose methylation erodes with age — probe selection itself was mechanistically motivated.

Epigenetic aging clocks are methylation-based measurements, so their TE-overlap distribution reflects where methylation exists and varies — consistent with the identity_dependent mode population rather than Polycomb TEs.
